attention4.ptxt: Condenser and radiator fins can easily be bent during removal of the condenser assembly.
Remove the condenser assembly carefully so as not to damage the condenser and radiator fins. If any of them is bent, straighten it using a flat head screwdriver or a pair of pliers.

s1.ptxt: Run engine at idle with A/C system on for 10 minutes.
Recover refrigerant from A/C system referring to “Recovery” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge .

attention3.ptxt: The amount of removed compressor oil must be measured to determine how much compressor oil is required for replenishment.

s1.ptxt: Remove discharge hose bolt (1) and liquid pipe bolt (2).
Disconnect discharge hose (3) and liquid pipe (4) from condenser assembly (5).

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.
Apply compressor oil to new O-ring of discharge hose and liquid pipe.

item.ptxt: Replenish the system with specified amount of compressor oil from compressor suction side referring to “Replenishing Compressor Oil” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge .
Evacuate and charge A/C system referring to “Evacuation” and “Charge” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge .
